title: Asparagus Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy vegetable stir fry recipe with asparagus, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish is low in calories and rich in vitamins.

ingredients.name: Peppery oil
ingredients.notes: Such as sesame or vegetable oil

ingredients.name: Saudia seasoning
ingredients.notes: Such as curry or chili powder

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of peppery oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the asparagus and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the garlic powder and saudia seasoning, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and add the remaining 1 tablespoon of peppery oil.
Stir in the stir-fry sauce, if using.
